column3:
Ashwagandha Plus is a carefully crafted formula combines essential vitamins with traditional adaptogens to help support everyday energy and vitality. Vitamin D3, B6, and B12 provide key nutrients that contribute to normal metabolism, healthy nervous system function, and overall wellness. L-Arginine helps support healthy circulation, while Maca and Panax Ginseng offer plant-based support for stamina and balance.

KSM-66® Ashwagandha and Shatavari powders bring centuries of traditional botanical wisdom into a modern supplement. These functional botanicals support a normal response to occasional stress, relaxation, and overall vitality. Each ingredient is included in precise amounts to complement one another and maintain a clean, effective blend.

Packaged in vegetarian-friendly HPMC capsules, this supplement is easy to incorporate into your daily routine. As a dietary supplement, adults take two (2) capsules daily, ideally with a meal. This blend is free from common allergens and artificial fillers, making it a versatile choice for those seeking a plant-forward approach to wellness.*

Ingredients: Vitamin D3 (as Cholecalciferol) (20 mcg), Vitamin B6 (as Pyridoxine Hydrochloride) (2.5 mg), Vitamin B12 (as Methylcobalamin 1%) (25 mcg), KSM-66® Ashwagandha Extract (standardized to 5% Withanolides) (600 mg), L-Arginine (300 mg), Maca Root Powder (Lepidium meyenii) (root) (150 mg), Panax Ginseng Powder (root) (100 mg), Shatavari Powder (Asparagus racemosus) (root) (50 mg), HPMC (vegetable capsule).

Manufacturer's country: USA

Product amount: 60 capsules / 1.6 oz / 0.1 lbs / 44 g

Gross weight (oz/lbs/g): 2.1 oz / 0.13 lbs / 60 g

Suggested use: As a dietary supplement, adults take two (2) capsules daily. For best results, take with 6-8 oz (177-237ml) of water or as directed by healthcare professional.

Warning: Do not exceed recommended dose. Pregnant or nursing mothers, children under the age of 18, and individuals with known medical conditions should consult a physician before using this or any dietary supplement. KEEP OUT OF THE REACH OF CHILDREN. DO NOT USE IF SAFETY SEAL IS DAMAGED OR MISSING. STORE IN A COOL, DRY PLACE.


*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

Brain & Focus Formula Capsules are crafted to support healthy cognitive function and nervous system wellness. This comprehensive formula combines essential vitamins and minerals with a proprietary blend of botanicals and amino acids known to help maintain mental clarity, concentration, and overall brain health. It’s designed for individuals seeking daily support for focus, memory, and cognitive vitality.

B-vitamins, Choline, and DHA are key nutrients for maintaining proper nerve function and supporting neurotransmitter health. Antioxidant-containing botanicals like Bacopa, Green Tea Extract, Bilberry, and Grape Seed Extract work together to help protect brain cells from oxidative stress, promoting long-term cognitive wellness.

The proprietary blend also includes DMAE, Phosphatidylserine, and Huperzine A to support memory and attention. With Brain & Focus Formula, you can feel confident in giving your mind the nutritional support it needs to stay sharp, alert, and energized throughout your busy day.*

Ingredients: Vitamin A (as Beta-Carotene) 122mcg RAE, Vitamin C (as Ascorbic Acid) 125mg, Calcium (as Calcium Carbonate), Iron (as Ferrous Fumarate), Vitamin D (as Cholecalciferol) 3mcg, Vitamin E (as DL-Alpha-Tocopheryl-acetate) 14mg, Vitamin B1 (as Thiamine Mononitrate) 3mg, Vitamin B2 (as Riboflavin) 1.7mg, Vitamin B3 (as Niacin) 12.5mg NE, Vitamin B6 (as Pyridoxine HCL) 12mg, Folate 680mcg DFE (400 mcg Folic Acid), Biotin 3mcg, Vitamin B5 (as D-Calcium Pantothenate) 12mg, Magnesium (as Magnesium Oxide) 50mg, Zinc (as Zinc Oxide) 10mg, Selenium (Selenium Amino Acid Chelate) 50mcg, Copper (as Copper Gluconate) 0.052mg, Manganese (as Manganese Amino Acid Chelate) 0.4mg, Chromium (as Chromium Picolinate) 12mcg, Molybdenum 10mcg, Potassium (as Potassium Citrate) 94mg, Choline (as Choline Bitartrate), Proprietary Blend (DMAE Bitartrate, L-Glutamine HCL, Glutamic Acid, Green Tea Extract, Bacopa Extract, Inositol, Bilberry Fruit Extract, GABA, Grape Seed Extract, Grapefruit Seed Extract, Olive Leaf, Cinnamon Bark Extract, Licorice Root Extract, Boron, DHA 14%, Vanadyl, Phosphatidylserine, Huperzine A) 617mg, Hypromellose (vegetable capsule), Rice Flour, Magnesium Stearate, Silicon Dioxide.

The word “complete” doesn’t do this quality multivitamin justice. That is because our multivitamin supplement comes loaded with all the crucial vitamins and minerals you need—including a vitamin B complex. But we didn't stop there. This daily vitamin also offers an entire range of natural antioxidants, like green tea, known for slowing the progression of illness and even aging.


Plus, we've added immune-supporting herbs like echinacea and spirulina and metabolic and prostate-supporting herbs like lutein, lycopene, and stinging nettle. Comes in easy-to-swallow capsules.*

Fat Burner with MCT combines Vitamin C, Vitamin B6, Choline, Chromium, L-Carnitine, and medium-chain triglycerides (MCT) to deliver a healthy approach to facilitating metabolic performance and consequent weight loss.


Burning fat is difficult for some individuals. Therefore, they must supplement with an effective fat burner with the correct ingredients to drive better results.


Choline is an essential nutrient that promotes healthy liver. MCTs may appear to increase thermogenesis, or heat production in the body, which aids dieters in fat burning and weight loss.*

Gut Health is formulated to provide comprehensive support for your digestive system, promoting a balanced gut environment and overall wellness. This dietary supplement combines Apple Cider Vinegar Powder, known for its natural digestive properties, and Inulin, a prebiotic fiber from Jerusalem artichoke root, to nourish beneficial gut bacteria.*


Lactobacillus acidophilus, a well-known probiotic, further aids in maintaining normal gut balance by promoting healthy intestinal flora. Along with DigeZyme®, a multi-enzyme complex, this formula helps support the breakdown of nutrients, promoting good absorption and digestion.*


Ideal for daily use, Gut Health is designed to help you feel your best from the inside out. Take 1-2 servings daily with water to support your digestive system and maintain overall gut health.*

Men’s Vitality Capsules are formulated to help you feel your best — inside and out. This comprehensive men’s wellness blend combines essential minerals with time-tested herbal ingredients traditionally used to support strength, stamina, and performance. It’s your daily support for energy, vitality, and overall masculine wellness.

Zinc plays a vital role in supporting reproductive health and hormone balance, while L-Arginine helps promote circulation and muscular endurance. Botanicals like Tongkat Ali, Maca, and Ginseng have long been celebrated for supporting energy levels, physical performance, and a healthy response to occasional stress. Together, they help you stay active, confident, and balanced throughout your day.

Our proprietary blend also includes extracts from Pumpkin Seed, Tribulus Terrestris, Muira Puama, and other natural ingredients known to promote male vitality. Whether you’re looking to maintain energy at work, in the gym, or beyond, Men’s Vitality Capsules are formulated to help you stay strong, focused, and at your peak.*

Whether you’re looking to support a normal, healthy heartbeat, maintain normal blood triglyceride levels, or incorporate omega-3s into your routine, these softgels offer a convenient solution.
